name: tachyon
description: Tachyon agent workflows for remote browser control, Tachyon CLI operations, Linear issue management, and Slack notification checks.

interface.shortDescription: Use Tachyon browser, CLI, Linear, and Slack workflows.
interface.longDescription: Use Tachyon workflows for the private k3s Cloudflare Mesh CDP browser gateway, Tachyon CLI Cloud App/build/log inspection, Linear issue management, and Slack notification verification through the Tachyon CLI.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Tachyon skills to control the remote browser, inspect Tachyon Cloud App state, manage Linear issues, or verify Slack notifications.
